selected_topic: What is Today? - Independence From Meat Day, Indivisible Day, International Cherry Pit Spitting Day
scene_metaphor: Hunk Mao throwing a giant cherry pit while dressed as a heroic liberty statue veggie-warrior, with a cookout-style arena where a vegetable vs meat food fight is happening in the background, and tiny cherry pits flying everywhere like fireworks.
image_prompt: square Instagram illustration featuring Hunk Mao as a cool orange tabby cat with expressive large eyes, a mischievous confident grin, and strong orange tabby markings, in an athletic and dynamic pose. Hunk Mao stands in the foreground dressed as a heroic liberty statue veggie-warrior, holding a giant cherry pit as if about to launch it with a slingshot. The setting is a cookout-style arena with a lively food fight happening in midground: anthropomorphic vegetables (carrots, peas, beans) and various meats (steaks, sausages, ribs) clash playfully. In the background, cherry pits fly like fireworks in the sky. The image is packed with tiny easter eggs like a hidden squirrel dressed as a chef tossing a veggie burger, a tiny scoreboard showing a cherry pit world record distance, a barbecue grill with smoke shaped like a peace sign, a dog with sunglasses chasing a spitting cherry pit, and a small crowd of various animals cheering. Hunk Mao wears a black hoodie hood pushed back and a green leafy crown resembling liberty’s torch flame. The scene is energetic, chaotic, youthful, playful, and perfect for a news-art metaphor. REQUIRED TEXT: "What is Today?", "Indivisible", "No Meat". Text is bold, block letter style, large and clear.
easter_eggs: Hidden squirrel chef tossing a veggie burger in the cookout arena
Scoreboard in the background showing a cherry pit record number
Barbecue smoke shaped into a peace sign
Dog wearing sunglasses chasing a flying cherry pit
Tiny crowd of assorted animals wearing miniature party hats
Cherry pits exploding in colorful firework patterns
Veggie characters (carrot, pea, bean) with exaggerated, playful expressions
Meat characters with funny battle poses like sausages with little swords
Hunk Mao’s green leafy crown shaped like liberty’s torch flame
Small slingshot leaning against Hunk Mao
Flyers or banners in the background with no text, just symbols of equality and veggies
A hidden mouse referee holding a whistle
caption: Cherry pits or veggie pits? Hunk Mao’s picking his battles—and his snacks! Freedom tastes fresher with no meat drama.
risk_notes: None. Playful cartoon metaphor with no political caricatures or financial advice.
